title: Danmu 30ml 1.18" x 2.75" Mini/ Tiny Glass Jars with Wood Cork Stoppers, Wishing/ Message Bottle for Halloween Decorations, Wedding/ Baby Shower Favors(12Pcs)
description:
About this item
These small glass jars with corks are great for DIY for perfume bottles. Mini bottles are also suitable for interchangeable pendant art pieces, message in a bottle charms, keepsake charms, and much more
Danmu small glass bottles are ideal for wedding decoration, home and garden decoration, baby shower decoration and other party decorations. Fill these tiny bottles with luminous colored sand, you will light up your fairy garden
Clear glass for seeing the items in it, great for DIY and art decoration. These cute glass bottles with cork are great for jewelry making, altered art, miniature art, etc.
Spell Jars Size: 1.18" x 2.75" Bottle Capacity: 30 ml
Danmu is a registered brand. Danmu aims to provide the best service to our customers, please buy with confidence!
› See more product details
reviews_5s:
I bought these beautiful little glass bottles to make a special lucky bottle for my future endeavors and special protection from bad luck and negative energy. And these are perfect for the size I am looking for.

These bottles are great for spell-binding and adorning the household with magic and wonder. And because they are affordable for anyone who wants to add a little bit of magic to their lives, it makes it possible for anyone who needs it.

The thickness of glass is quite thin whereas caution must be taken as it can break easily.

Despite this, they are very easy to clean and dry. Washing them down is a breeze amid the fragility of the thinness of the glass.

Plus, I'd like to point out that before I opened the box I heard some ringing in some of the bottles and feared that the bottles were broken. After I had inspected the entire box, none of them were damaged. There were just glass shards inside the bottles.

It looks like quality control was not thoroughly checked with how many bottles had glass shards inside them.Great bottles. Using them for some jar and candle magic. Cork fits nicely. The bottle is a little thinner than I thought but should still work perfectly fine as long as its not thrown anywhere and stored properly.My grandson wanted these. They arrived quickly. None were broke. Well packaged.Absolutely love them! They are bigger than I thought but small enough for what I needed it for. Thank you.We've been collecting sand from beaches we visit on travels, the kids love it and these work perfect (and look great) for storing it.I painted grass on these and put fire fly stickers on the outside. Made a paper label for inside with”let your light shine”So cute for storing herbs and spices!Threw a Harry Potter themed party for my wife and got some little potion stickers for these and filled them up!Packaging could be a little better to avoid the bottles from rattling around. I'm surprised there wernt any broken. Overall happy with the productAs described, value for the money, good design
reviews_1s: The box package arrived with all of the bottle shattered. My little cousin was the one to open it, poor kid almost got a lap full of glass. i tried getting a refund but i need a picture of the condition, unfortunately all of the glass has been thrown away so it looks like i wasted 10 dollars for nothing. Do not buy this product if your worried about it breaking, they seem to be very fragile, even for glass.Lids come off just by simply turning bottle on side. Do nor recommend and would not buy againOne of the jars had a small crack in the bottom so when I put sand in it, it broke open and sliced open my thumb. Needed stitches.I just received this order today. This was legitimately delivered 2 mins ago, as I heard the driver arrive. I pick up the box and the first thing I hear is glass so I already knew that didn’t sound good. I open it and it has come broken as you can see in the photos.The glass on the bottles cracked once the cork was secured to seal the bottle.The corks wouldn't stay inI thought they were bigger and you could store something in them disappointedDo you stink your perfume wasn’t able to clean had to re-order and the new ones I bought were able to see need to look around and then I made them smell team once every order they were OKItem received broke
